---
name: Security Issue
about: Report a security vulnerability (non-sensitive details only)
title: '[SECURITY] '
labels: security
assignees: ''
---

**IMPORTANT: Do NOT include sensitive details here.**

For security vulnerabilities, email support@bellmark.ai with:
- Affected version/commit
- Impact summary
- Reproduction steps

This template is for tracking only. Details should be sent privately.

**Severity Estimate**
- [ ] Critical (data exposure, RCE)
- [ ] High (auth bypass, injection)
- [ ] Medium (information disclosure)
- [ ] Low (minor issue)

**Brief Description** (no exploit details)
